title: Google Translate node not authorized
symptom: The Google Translate node fails to authenticate, resulting in a 'Not Authorized' error when attempting to use it in a workflow.
not_this_if: Different node is causing the issue
root_cause: The error occurs because the user's email ID was not added to the audience section in the Google Console during the OAuth2 setup. This is a required step for proper authentication and authorization.
fix_steps: Add your email ID to the audience list
If issues persist, consider creating a new OAuth client ID
agent_instruction: Add your email ID to the audience section in Google Console to resolve the authorization issue.
